results.title: An implied term too far? Compound interest, statutory silence and the limits of finality in Daniel Ofori v Ecobank Ghana Limited
results.description: After eighteen years of litigation, Ghana's Supreme Court has ruled that a judgment creditor is entitled to monthly compound interest at thirty per cent per annum.
